core.decorators module

core.decorators.journalist_editor_required(view_func)[source]

Decorator to restrict access to Journalist and Editor users only.

core.decorators.journalist_required(view_func)[source]

Decorator to restrict access to Journalist users only.

core.decorators.publisher_blocked(view_func)[source]

Decorator to restrict Publishers from accessing.

core.decorators.publisher_required(view_func)[source]

Decorator to restrict accesss to Publishers only.

core.decorators.reader_required(view_func)[source]

Decorator to restrict access to Reader users only.
